changeSet.author: nour
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS attachment ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, file_name VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL, original_file_name VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL, content_type VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL, file_size BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, storage_path VARCHAR(1024) NOT NULL, is_deleted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ, deleted_by VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), created_by VARCHAR(255), updated_by VARCHAR(255) ); COMMENT ON TABLE attachment IS 'Stores file/attachment metadata for any entity';
